criteria.name: Password hashed with bcrypt or argon2
criteria.check: Uses bcrypt, argon2, or passlib for password hashing (not md5/sha256)

criteria.name: No hardcoded secrets
criteria.check: No hardcoded API keys, JWT secrets, or database passwords in source

criteria.name: Environment variables for secrets
criteria.prompt: Are secrets (DB URL, JWT secret) loaded from environment variables or a config file, not hardcoded? Answer yes/no.
